final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing employee ID badge for ByteDance, showing both front and back sides, with photorealistic rendering.

Style/medium: photorealistic product mockup, employee ID badge
Composition: dual-sided layout showing front and back of the badge side by side or front-and-back view
Subject: ByteDance employee ID badge
Scene/backdrop: neutral studio backdrop or shallow depth of field surface
Lighting/mood: soft product photography lighting with subtle reflections on plastic/laminate surface
Color palette: ByteDance brand colors (blue, white, black accents)
Materials/textures: PVC card stock, glossy laminate finish, lanyard clip hardware
Text (verbatim): 字节跳动
Constraints: both front and back sides must be visible, realistic badge proportions and thickness, lanyard hole visible
Avoid: cartoonish or flat illustration style, missing back side, fantasy elements
